itemStatusLegend.ready: Asset PNG exists and is approved-for-review in this batch.
itemStatusLegend.planned: Name reserved in the trait system; artwork not drawn yet.
itemStatusLegend.default: Always-present baseline for a required category; 'classic'/'fresh-grass' render the canonical base with no overlay.

base.framing: front-facing, full-body (head + body + four legs + hooves + tail)
base.renderStyle: soft-shaded pixel art matching the HANSOME mascot palette and rendering
base.description: The individual alpaca body. Each is an ORIGINAL, full-body HANSOME alpaca with its own wool shape, head silhouette, ear shape, facial expression, and fluff style — sharing the HANSOME palette, proportions, and pixel rendering, but never a clone of the mascot. Every one 'lives in the same village'. The mascot is never minted as its own token; its iconic appearance is used ONLY by Founder #001 (one of the 10 Reserved).

reserved.name: HANSOME Mascot
reserved.notes: Official mascot. Branding only, never independently minted, not counted in the 500, permanently owned by the HANSOME project. Its iconic appearance is used ONLY as the visual base of Founder #001 — no other Public/Reserved/Legendary NFT may reuse it.

artworkVersions.note: Two versions are preserved for every archetype. Nearest-neighbor scaling only — no smoothing / soft interpolation anywhere in the pipeline.

original.purpose: UNFRAMED transparent artwork — the visual source of truth for NFT portrait generation. No scaling applied (identity-preserving).

normalized.purpose: Canonical avatar-frame artwork — uniform scale, ground-aligned, centered with reserved headroom. Used for shared avatar proportions, animation rigging, trait fitting, and HANSOME HUB rendering.

base.anchorsStatus: generated + verified via base/_anchors-overlay.png (detected on the normalized frame)

candidateModels.A_baked_archetypes: CHOSEN. A curated set of full-body base bodies (each its own wool+silhouette+ear+expression). Individuality comes from base + accessories + palette shifts.
candidateModels.B_modular_layers: Not used. Split base identity into layered sub-traits — more combinations but harder art cohesion.

background.description: Full-canvas countryside scenes behind the alpaca. Warm, cozy, rural — never neon or club-style.

fur.description: Wool Styles. Overlay tufts/texture drawn over the chosen individual base. 'Classic' adds no overlay. Note: under the mascot policy this is a texture accent on an already-original base, not a way to re-create the mascot's wool.

clothing.description: Cozy garments on the neck/chest — scarves, knitwear, bandanas, ponchos. Handmade village feel, not street fashion.

necklace.label: Neck Accessories
necklace.keyNote: Category renamed to 'Neck Accessories' for display. The internal key 'necklace' and folder 'necklaces/' are kept stable so existing asset IDs and references don't break.
necklace.description: Neck Accessories — bold, handcrafted pieces worn around the neck/upper chest (carved pendants, farm bells, clover charms, wooden beads, berry vines). Designed as strong character traits that read at NFT size, cozy countryside village feel — not realistic/luxury jewelry. Sits above clothing in the z-order (clothing compatibility considered, clothing not yet drawn). Authored as tight transparent sprites; placed on each archetype via the neck + chest anchors and measured neck width (see necklaces/_necklaces-meta.json, scripts-nft/necklaces/fit-necklaces.mjs).
necklace.manualOffsets: none — all 5 neck accessories fit all 8 archetypes fully anchor-driven (verified 40/40: no face/leg clipping, no floating, no out-of-bounds; consistent scaling)

face.description: Face Details — subtle marks on the cheek/face. Added folder (not in the original list) so the described Face Details traits have a home.

mouth.description: Mouth Accessories — what the alpaca is nibbling. 'Fresh Grass' is the canonical default already on the base.

ears.description: Ear Accessories — small decorations on the ear. Added folder (not in the original list) so the described Ear Accessories have a home.

glasses.description: Eyewear over the visible eye. Frame reads across the 3/4 face.

hat.description: Headwear resting on the wool crown. Countryside/handmade — straw, wool, flowers, farm caps. Authored as tight transparent sprites; placed on each archetype via the crown anchor + measured head width (see hats/_hats-meta.json, scripts-nft/hats/fit-hats.mjs).
hat.manualOffsets: none — all 5 hats fit all 8 archetypes fully anchor-driven (verified: no clipping / floating / eye-overlap; consistent scaling)

effects.description: Nature Accessories & ambient overlays — butterfly, bee, falling leaf, floating clover, vine, gentle sparkles. Drawn on top.

legendary.description: 20 one-of-one hand-designed alpacas, each with its own identity. NOT random combinations. Layer order does not apply; each is a full custom composite.
